name: Hopus
notes:
You will find more details regarding the technical functionalities we implemented (RS, IRR Filtering, RPKI/ROA validation, RTBH/Blackholing) on our page: [https://hopus.net/en/tech](https://hopus.net/en/tech)

Looking glass : [https://lg.hopus.net/](https://lg.hopus.net/)

BGP communities available on our [aut-num object](https://apps.db.ripe.net/db-web-ui/#/lookup?source=ripe&key=AS44530&type=aut-num)

See [https://www.peeringdb.com/ix/1320](https://www.peeringdb.com/ix/1320) (or preferably [https://hopus.net/](https://hopus.net/)) for our list of POPs and connected networks.
